subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of the Blessed Beauty! When the Peerless Lord shed the radiance of His grace from the horizon of the placeless realm upon the world of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جمال مبارک حضرت بیچون چون از افق لامکان بر اهل امکان اشراق فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital, @human reality created in the image of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
